message:
fix(core): resolve 27 clippy warnings across 8 modules

- edit_distance: bool_to_int_with_if, range_loop, for_each, suboptimal_flops
- compact_bitset, time_series: manual_div_ceil → div_ceil()
- diagram_render: must_use on builder, unused_self allow
- graph_scoring: suboptimal_flops, implicit_hasher → generic BuildHasher
- persistent_ds: map_or → is_none_or
- shortest_path, topological_sort: needless_range_loop, manual_contains

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
